view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for revenue tracking and forecasting is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for revenue tracking and forecasting is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for revenue tracking and forecasting by referencing the linked use case, which includes specific revenue figures and trends. The summary of the linked use case states that the salon owner reviews a monthly dashboard showing total revenue of $18,450, which directly addresses the need for revenue tracking. Additionally, the evidence from the prior step 'owner-revenue-sanity' confirms the total revenue across bookings, further supporting that the requirement is covered.
